content.en:
Subsequently.

Ouyang Jiu'er cut a small piece of the Forbidden Mother Stone for Ye Tian, although it was a very small piece, at most only one percent of the Forbidden Mother Stone, but Ye Tian was already very excited.

After all, the relationship between the two of them has not reached the point of being too close, strictly speaking, they are just friends and partners, and many supreme Dao Ancestors seem to be friends with each other, but once they are forbidden to the mother stone, they will even fight desperately.

Therefore, Ouyang Jiu'er was already very generous to be able to give him a small piece of the Forbidden Mother Stone.

If Ouyang Jiu'er gave him too many forbidden mother stones, he wouldn't dare to ask for them!

Ye Tian stayed at Ouyang Jiu'er's residence for a while, and the two chatted for a long time.

After that, Ye Tian returned to his palace and began to retreat and cultivate, while using the Forbidden Dao Stone to improve his cultivation, and relying on the Forbidden Mother Stone to comprehend the Forbidden Dao.

The other side.

Heavenly Emperor's Palace.

The True Martial Palace Lord and the Blue Dragon Palace Lord stood on the edge of the Heavenly Emperor Palace, and among them, the True Martial Palace Lord held a war bow in his hand.

"Zhenwu, just now you couldn't shoot this arrow, no one knows who shot this arrow, I'm afraid that the Tianhai Sect will still suspect the hand of the Mitian Sect and the Ten Thousand Domains Divine Temple at this moment!"

"It's not interesting, it's too embarrassing to be sneaky like this all the time!I actually prefer to kill directly!" said the master of the True Martial Palace.

The Qinglong Palace Lord also nodded: "I also like to do it directly, small actions like this are really not suitable for me, but there is no way, the orders of the Domain Ancestor are not something you and I can disobey! Our task is to promote the birth of the Forbidden Realm, and this process does not allow any changes." It's a pity that the forbidden world is too difficult to be born, our Heavenly Emperor Palace has worked hard for so long, and it has only made a little sprout, and today's Xuanxu Ancient Realm still needs a lot of blood and souls of living beings, and it is best to be the lives of True Ancestors and Dao Ancestors, so that the Xuanxu Ancient Realm can continue to evolve and eventually become a forbidden world. However, there are too many True Ancestors and Dao Ancestors needed, and once we kill them, those forces will definitely all rebel against us. Like now, wave after wave of cutting and killing them, generation after generation of True Ancestors and Dao Ancestors have been killed by us, we can definitely make the Xuanxu Ancient Realm grow!"

"Yes!" "Yes!" the True Martial Palace Lord nodded, "No matter how much they grow, they can't surpass our Heavenly Emperor Palace, as long as they can't give birth to the Domain Ancestor, it will be a dish in our hands!And once the Forbidden Realm is born, we can use the Forbidden Realm as the coordinates to provide the coordinates for the Domain Ancestor, so that the Domain Ancestor can find here across the Dark Forbidden Domain!"

However, there was still a thought in the hearts of the two of them, that is, not to attract the domain ancestor, in this way, in this strange realm, they would be the strongest and dominate a realm.

But the thought was fleeting, and they didn't dare to think about it anymore.

One is the other palace master of the Heavenly Emperor Palace, the White Tiger Palace Master, who is an heir of the Vast Sea Ancestor, although his strength is not as good as them, he will definitely not allow them to do so.

The second is that even if the Vast Sea Ancestor does not have the Forbidden Realm as a coordinate, he will still find this realm in the future.

They were very aware of the strength of the Vast Sea Ancestors, they could be called the strongest realm lords in the past, and they had the upper hand in fighting several Domain Ancestors alone, and they didn't think that those Domain Ancestors would be able to surround and kill the Vast Sea Ancestors.

There is also the most important third point, once the Forbidden Realm is born, they even hope to take advantage of the great opportunity of the birth of the Forbidden Realm to step into the Domain Ancestor level in one fell swoop.

Otherwise, even if they were already half-step domain ancestors, and they had the hope of becoming domain ancestors, they didn't know how many long years it would take.

Therefore, it is also their hope to promote the birth of the forbidden world.

"By the way, it is said that the Forbidden Mother Stone was taken away by a true ancestor, and even the Heavenly Emperor Mirror did not detect the whereabouts of that true ancestor, it seems that the other party knew about the Heavenly Emperor Mirror of our Heavenly Emperor Palace, and deliberately shielded the Heavenly Emperor Mirror!"

"It's really strange!" The Blue Dragon Palace Lord frowned and said: "The Heavenly Emperor Mirror can see everything, even the traces of the Supreme Dao Ancestor Secret Immortal Dao Ancestor have been detected by us and locked, how can a mere True Ancestor get rid of the lock of the Heavenly Emperor Mirror? Unless that person also has a treasure on his body that is not weaker than the Heavenly Emperor Mirror, or has a forbidden secret technique! According to my guess, the Forbidden Secret Technique is the most likely, a Supreme True Ancestor can have a forbidden secret technique against the Heavenly Emperor Mirror, and his identity is definitely not ordinary, could it be the reincarnation of an old friend?"

"This possibility is there, and we should pay attention to it at ordinary times, a supreme true ancestor, and it is so weird, we will definitely be able to become a half-step domain ancestor in the future, don't let the other party disturb our plans!" said the master of the True Martial Palace.

"Even if the other party knows our plan, he doesn't dare to stir it up, it's looking for death! Moreover, the half-step domain ancestor also hopes that the forbidden realm can be born, such as the Black Wind Mountain, this force is likely to also have a half-step domain ancestor, the vast sea ancestor said that the Black Wind Mountain is very mysterious, and he is not sure to destroy the other party. No matter how careful our plan is, we may not be able to hide it from Black Wind Mountain. But there was no movement from Black Wind Mountain, perhaps it acquiesced to our plan!" said the main Dao of the Blue Dragon Palace.

"Black Wind Mountain is a bandit, and they will naturally not sabotage our plans for the sake of profit. In short, the Heavenly Emperor Sect should not be exposed at the moment, at least after the Xuanxu Ancient Realm was promoted to the Ancient Realm, we will be born again!"

In the Xuanxu Ancient Realm, many forces naturally didn't know about the conversation between the Qinglong Palace Lord and the True Martial Palace Master, otherwise they would kill the Heavenly Emperor Palace one by one.

Because he didn't know the truth, with the fall of the Secret Immortal Dao Ancestor, the relationship between the three Nine Heavens forces became very delicate, and even the relationship with those Eight Heavens forces became very poor.

If there is any doubt, the Tianhai Sect will not let it go.

Under such circumstances, the friction between the Heavenly Sea Sect and other Eight Heavens and Nine Heavens forces continued, and even many fights between True Ancestors broke out.

In addition, the situation of the original true ancestors of the God of War True Kingdom was not good, all the true ancestors who were suspected of obtaining forbidden Dao stones or forbidden strange things were assassinated one by one, even if many true ancestors really did not have forbidden Dao stones and forbidden strange objects, but as long as they were the object of suspicion, they would inevitably be killed.

Under such circumstances, those True Ancestors who had obtained the Forbidden Dao Stone and many forbidden strange things traded their treasures with the Dao Ancestors behind them to obtain a large amount of resources, so as to improve their strength in a short period of time, or simply not go out.

In short, for a period of time after the appearance of each forbidden treasure land, the Xuanxu Ancient Realm was very chaotic, and many True Ancestors fell, but there were also many True Ancestors who rose.

And the Terran is very comfortable during this period of time, many Terran geniuses go out to practice, and people from other forces are very polite, and few people dare to offend the Terran.

Not for anything else, just because Ye Tian has become a supreme true ancestor, his strength far surpasses that of other invincible true ancestors, and he can even easily kill the invincible true ancestor.

In the case that Dao Ancestor didn't make a move, who would dare to offend Ye Tian?

And how could Dao Ancestors be born casually, once every Dao Ancestor is born, it will be difficult to come out again next time, otherwise the price is not something they can bear.

Moreover, ordinary Dao Ancestors were also beaten by Ye Tian when they came out, only the top Sevenfold Heavenly Dao Ancestor could fight Ye Tian, and it was difficult for the Eightfold Heaven Supreme Dao Ancestor to kill Ye Tian.

Therefore, the human race blessed by Ye Tian can be called the first clan in the Xuanxu Ancient Realm.

And Ye Tian didn't manage these small things, as long as the human race didn't fight secretly, he would be arrogant outside, anyway, the Dao Ancestors of the Xuanxu Ancient Realm couldn't be easily born at the moment, and he could stop the scene alone.

Of course, he is also doing his best to cultivate, striving to raise his strength to another level.

In a flash, 800,000 years have passed.

On this day, Ye Tian ushered in the first good news!

He had finally cultivated the Thousand Dao Technique of the Great Wilderness Law Body to the extreme level, which was a huge improvement, and his strength had improved a lot.

Tens of thousands of years have passed, and his forbidden body has been refined to fifty percent, and the power of the True Ancestor, the power of the body, and the power of the soul have also increased a lot.

Then, another 100,000 years passed, and the Thousand Dao Techniques of the Ten Thousand True Spears were also raised to the limit level.

With the passage of time, the Thousand Dao Techniques in a single sect have successively reached the limit level, which has improved Ye Tian's strength a lot, and it is no longer comparable to the past.

Now, if Ye Tian was allowed to fight with the Void Mi Dao Ancestor again, he would not be seriously injured by the other party's blow, and he would not need to use the power of the origin to heal his injuries.

Of course, he still couldn't compete with a supreme Dao Ancestor like the Void Mi Dao Ancestor in the Xuanxu Ancient Realm, at most he could fight a few more moves.

"I still have to rely on the Forbidden Dao, once I comprehend the Forbidden Dao, even if I don't realize the Endless Forbidden Dao, my strength can also undergo earth-shaking changes, and I am absolutely sure to fight hard with the weaker Supreme Dao Ancestor!"

Ye Tian said darkly.
